Title: Watercolor Rainbow Brush Stain Corner Decorative Border Accent
Description:
Elevate your crafts and decor with this beautiful watercolor rainbow brush stain accent. This art print features soft, abstract strokes of pastel colors—including sky blue, lavender, lemon yellow, and coral—resembling a gentle, diffused rainbow across the top and bottom corners.

The watercolor effect gives the piece a hand-painted, artistic feel, making it incredibly versatile for various projects. Perfect as a standalone piece of abstract art, or used as a decorative border accent on invitations, scrapbooking pages, journals, or digital designs.

  • Artistic Aesthetic: The watercolor texture offers a light, airy, and whimsical touch, suitable for seasonal themes, baby showers, or joyful celebrations.
  • Versatile Use: Ideal for journaling, wedding invitations, greeting cards, scrapbook layouts, or simply framing as a unique piece of wall art.
  • Craft Project Enhancement: Use it to frame photos or add a splash of colorful, gentle flair to school projects and handmade gifts.

Whether you are a skilled crafter or just looking for a charming decorative element, this rainbow corner accent adds an instant pop of joyful color and professional design appeal to any medium.
